prompt: generate a meditation app interface with breathing visualizations as expanding and contracting geometric mandalas, soft forest background with dappled sunlight effects, timer shaped like a lotus flower
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a modern meditation application interface. The primary visualization prominently features a vibrant, intricate geometric mandala, centered on the screen, appearing to be in a state of expansion or contraction as a breathing guide. The background consists of a soft, subtly out-of-focus forest scene with gentle dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. A discrete timer, elegantly designed as a lotus flower icon, is subtly integrated into the bottom portion of the interface.
objects: vibrant, intricate geometric mandala, centered on the screen
soft, subtly out-of-focus forest scene background
gentle dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy
discrete timer, in the bottom portion of the interface
lotus flower icon, designed as the timer
